description.ko: 궤도 시점에서 바라본 지구의 다양한 풍경을 추상적으로 탐구하며, 침식, 퇴적 및 광물 퇴적물이 만들어낸 자연의 예술성을 강조합니다.
description.en: An abstract exploration of Earth's diverse landscapes from an orbital perspective, highlighting the natural artistry of erosion, sediment, and mineral deposits.

prompt: High-resolution satellite photography of Earth's surface textures, featuring a combination of intricate river deltas, swirling desert sand dunes in ochre and gold, and jagged crystalline salt flats, abstract geological patterns, hyper-detailed, 8k, cinematic lighting, top-down perspective
